messages.content:
- Add the delivery date to the current date. The delivery date will be provided as text and could specify a time frame such as "1 week", "2 weeks" or even be in days or months. Use this delivery date to calculate the final date by adding it to the current date.
- Need output in this format: YYYY-MM-DD
- Output the final result in the following JSON format:
{ 
  "convert_date": "",
  "milli_timestamp": "",
  "delivery_timeframe": "",
  "final_date": ""
}

mapper.data:
{
  "Name": "{{11.property_name}}-{{11.Address}}",
  "PropertyContact": {
    "FirstName": "{{11.First_Name}}",
    "LastName": "{{11.Last_Name}}",
    "Email": "{{11.email}}",
    "PhoneNumber": "{{11.Phone}}",
    "Title": "{{11.Title}}",
    "Company": "{{11.Company}}",
    "AddressStreet": "{{11.Address}}"
  },
  "Number": "{{11.Job_Number}}",
"Status":"7",
"PropertyId": {{49.data.Id}},
  "Fee":{{if(11.Fee; 11.Fee; 0)}},
  "Retainer": {{if(11.Fee; (((parseNumber(43.custom_fields.`3.7 - Retainer Amount (%)`)) / 100) * parseNumber(11.Fee)) * if(11.Disbursement_Amount; ((parseNumber(11.Disbursement_Amount) / 100) + 1); 1) * 1.05; 0)}},
"Scopes": "{{11.Scope}}",
"ClientComments": "Client Organization Name: {{43.custom_fields.`1.2 - Client Organization Name`}}, Client Organization Address: {{43.custom_fields.`1.3 - Client Organization Address`}}, Client Organization Phone: {{43.custom_fields.`1.4 - Client Phone`}}, Client Organization Email: {{43.custom_fields.`1.5 - Client Email`}}",
"Comments": "Disbursement Amount: {{11.Disbursement_Amount}}, Payment Terms: {{11.Payment_Terms}}, Additional Comments: {{replace(11.Additional_Comments; """"; "'")}}",
"OwnerId":"6276",{{if(11.Property_Rights_Appraised; """Purposes"": """ + 11.Property_Rights_Appraised + """,")}}{{if(11.Valuation_Premises; """RequestedValues"": """ + 11.Valuation_Premises + """,")}}{{if(48.result.final_date; toString("""") + "DueDate"": """ + 48.result.final_date + toString(""","))}}{{if(48.result.convert_date; toString("""") + "BidDate"": """ + 48.result.convert_date + toString(""""))}}}

messages.content:
You are provided with two pieces of information: 
- A timestamp in milliseconds (Milli timestamp) that represents the current date.
- A delivery date in text format (e.g., "1 week", "2 weeks", "5 days", "3 months", etc.).

Your task is to:
- Convert the Milli timestamp into a human-readable date. 
- Parse the delivery date, interpret the timeframe, and add that duration to the current date.
- Output the final result in the following JSON format:
{ 
"convert_date_from_milli_timestamp": "",
  "milli_timestamp": "",
  "delivery_timeframe": "",
  "final_date": ""
}
